sample.githubSyntax: GitHub syntax: {'@'}sheepbox8646, #595, https://github.com/memohai/Memoh/issues/595, and [linked PR](https://github.com/memohai/Memoh/pull/595). Inline code stays literal: `#595 {'@'}sheepbox8646 https://github.com/memohai/Memoh/issues/595`.

features.title: Features
features.sponsorshipsUnavailable: Sponsorships state is unavailable for this repository.
features.wikisHint: Wikis host documentation for your repository.
features.issuesHint: Issues integrate lightweight task tracking into your repository. Keep projects on track with issue labels and milestones, and reference them in commit messages.
features.projectsHint: Projects on GitHub help you organize and prioritize your work. You can create projects for specific feature work, comprehensive roadmaps, or release checklists.
features.discussionsHint: Discussions is the space for your community to have conversations, ask questions and post answers without opening issues.
features.sponsorshipsHint: Sponsorships help your community know how to financially support this repository.

pullRequests.mergeCommitsHint: Add all commits from the head branch to the base branch with a merge commit.
pullRequests.squashMergingHint: Combine all commits from the head branch into a single commit in the base branch.
pullRequests.rebaseMergingHint: Add all commits from the head branch onto the base branch individually.
pullRequests.updateBranchHint: Whenever there are new changes available in the base branch, present an update branch option in the pull request.
pullRequests.autoMergeHint: Waits for merge requirements to be met and then merges automatically.
pullRequests.deleteBranchOnMergeHint: Automatically delete head branches after pull requests are merged. Deleted branches will still be able to be restored.

descriptions.commit: View a commit's metadata and changed files.
descriptions.inbox: Collect notifications, mentions, and review requests into a clean workspace entry point.
descriptions.pullRequest: Pull request data for {owner}/{repo} #{number} will be connected here.
descriptions.pullRequestList: Pull requests in this category are listed from the sidebar tree. A full list view can be connected here later.
descriptions.issue: Issue data for {owner}/{repo} #{number} will be connected here.
descriptions.issueList: Issues in this category are listed from the sidebar tree. A full list view can be connected here later.
descriptions.newRepository: Set up a repository under your account or an organization.
descriptions.notFound: No GitHub account, organization, or repository matched this input.
descriptions.repo: {owner}/{repo} is open as a repository tab. This version only keeps URL, type, and placeholder state.
descriptions.reviews: Keep pull requests and merge checks in a focused tab that can grow into real data later.
descriptions.searchResult: Results are loaded from the GitHub Search API.

empty.description: Try a different query or broaden the search.
empty.noQueryDescription: Open Search workspace and choose a search action.
empty.title: No results

error.description: GitHub could not return these search results.
error.title: Search failed

searchResult.incomplete: GitHub returned incomplete search results. Try narrowing the search.
searchResult.title: Search "{query}"

notFound.description: Check the spelling, paste a GitHub URL, or search GitHub results.
notFound.title: Could not find "{input}"

newRepository.title: Create a new repository
newRepository.description: A repository contains all project files, including the revision history.

fields.name: Repository name
fields.publicHint: Anyone on the internet can see this repository.
fields.privateHint: You choose who can see and commit to this repository.
fields.initReadme: Initialize this repository with a README

validation.nameInvalid: Repository names can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores, and periods.

newRepository.templatesError: Failed to load templates. You can still create the repository without them.

app.description: App details are not supported yet. This is a placeholder page.
